Smoothies & Shakes

The
Attach
Effect.

40% shake attach rate adds £3.20 to every transaction. 20% snack attach adds £0.50. Together they build the £13.00 blended AOV that makes the model work.

Transaction Ramp (tx/day)

40 tx/day at open → 225 mature state (Month 9). Break-even at 140 tx/day (Month 7+).

EBITDA Positive
Ramp Period
Key Milestones
Month 1: Site opens. Angel / Upper Street, Islington.
Month 2–3: Ramp period. Building the regular customer base.
Month 6: Pre-opening costs fully amortised.
Month 7: First EBITDA-positive month.
Month 9: Mature transaction volumes reached. Playbook documented.
Month 10–12: Every month cash-generative. Site 2 scouting underway.
Year 1: Operational playbook proven. Angel site profitable.
Year 2: Site 2 opens. Group EBITDA margin expands.
Year 3: Third site open. Replication model proven. FUUL is a group.
